reviews.comment:
Hoy  a la tarde cargué combustible en la estación de servicio ACA  de Villa Mascardi  y me olvidé el morral lleno de documentos dinero y tarjetas de crédito. En el mini mercado de la estación ..me fui y volví a las dos horas y me lo devolvieron. Así que quiero agradecer al dueño y y a todos sus empleados por.la amabilidad

(Translated by Google)
This afternoon I filled up my car at the ACA gas station in Villa Mascardi and forgot my bag full of documents, money, and credit cards. I left at the station's convenience store and came back two hours later, and they returned it to me. So I want to thank the owner and all his employees for their kindness.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzNHJUM1VREAE

reviews.comment:
Un empleado para 4 mangueras surtidoras... Si podes mejor carga en Bariloche o el bolsón... 20 min para surtir 2 autos. Los baños pocos y sucios.... Un agua mineral $130
No está a la altura de un ACA

(Translated by Google)
One employee for four fuel pumps... If you can, fill up in Bariloche or El Bolsón... 20 minutes to fill up two cars. Few and dirty restrooms... A bottle of bottled water costs $130. It's not up to ACA standards.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzd3ZXaGhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Se aprovechan que no tienen competencia y los responsables de la venta de comida del ACA son unos ladrones tres baguettes con fiambre 1200 pesos. Hacen las argentinadas de siempre. Te estafan. Se aprovechan. NO CONSUMAN EN ESE LUGAR

(Translated by Google)
They take advantage of the lack of competition, and the people in charge of selling food at the ACA are thieves. Three baguettes with cold cuts cost 1200 pesos. They pull the same old tricks. They rip you off. They take advantage. DO NOT EAT AT THAT PLACE
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzN09pUjlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
El ACA siempre está, aunque esta vez no sé por que no me tomo el descuento

(Translated by Google)
The ACA is always there, although this time I don't know why I didn't take the discount
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzck5xbURBEAE

reviews.comment:
Mala atención en la proveeduría, poca a nula oferta para comer. Hicimos unas consultas por lugares a visitar y prácticamente no nos respondieron nada. No nos gustó y nos fuimos a comer a otro lado, no consumimos nada. No cargamos combustible. No está a la altura del resto de las dependencias del ACA que suelo visitar.

(Translated by Google)
Poor service at the convenience store, little to no food options. We asked about places to visit and received virtually no response. We didn't like it and went to eat somewhere else; we didn't buy anything. We didn't fill up our tanks. It's not up to the standard of the other ACA branches I usually visit.

reviewReply.comment: Sr Eduardo, pasaron 3 años. Con gusto le esperaremos en su próxima visita.

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5108201586824019782/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzcE51SVJBEAE
